title: Traditional German Pork Dumplings
description: A hearty German-inspired dish featuring flavorful pork dumplings in a savory broth.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine pork shoulder, flour, egg, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Knead the mixture until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls, about the size of a small egg.
In a large pot, boil vegetable broth.
When the broth is boiling, carefully add the pork dumplings.
Cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the dumplings float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the broth and serve hot.
Serve the dumplings in the savory broth, sprinkled with chopped onion and caraway seeds.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
